taxonomy: Notodanthonia longifolia is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a member of the genus Notodanthonia, which is a group of grasses endemic to the southwestern part of Western Australia. Notodanthonia longifolia is further classified as a species of the tribe Danthonieae within the family Poaceae. This classification suggests that Notodanthonia longifolia is closely related to other species within the Danthonieae tribe. Notodanthonia longifolia's specific classification provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
